title: Sniffer Archaeology (Cobblemon)
description: Sniffers too boring for you? This Cobblemon addon adds more items to their loot table, while not discounting from the vanilla functionality.
body:
I told tim that his [Sniffer addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-sniffers-diggin-up-relics) was unbalanced. He told me to ***"Be the change you wish to see"***, so I made this addon that adds Cobblemon drops to Sniffers in a more *balanced* way.

This addon adds:
- Relic Coins
- Tumblestones
- Type Gems
- Relic Coin Pouches
- Vivichoke Seeds
- Revival Herb
- Mental Herb
- Power Herb
- White Herb
- Mirror Herb
- Big Root
- Energy Root
- & Every Fossil

to the Sniffer loot pool, providing more incentive for people to go out in search of a Sniffer.

The way that this pack is set up makes it so that while digging up a plant, Sniffers also have a 60% chance to simultaneously dig up an archaeology item, as to not make the archaeology drops unnecessarily common.

Credits to tmetcalfe89 and his [Sniffer addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-sniffers-diggin-up-relics), which served as inspiration. This datapack was made in agreement with the MIT License under which tim's addon is licensed.
